title: spondias bahiensis
intro: Spondias bahiensis, also known as the Brazilian plum or cupuaçu, is a tropical tree native to the Atlantic Forest of Brazil. The fruit of this plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Spondias bahiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The fruit can be made into herbal preparations such as jams, jellies, and infusions, which can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
